Explanation:
The table shows that in the 2002/03 season with RAEC Mons in the Jupiler League, the player played 19 games. No other season listed has 19 games (others are 23, 29, 26, 29, 25, 31, 14, 1, 0). Therefore, the Prediction Answer 2002/03 correctly identifies the year with a total of 19 games played.
